contentBlocks.original:
कस्तूरितिलकं ललाटपटले वक्षःस्थले कौस्तुभं
नासाग्रे नवमौक्तिकं करतले वेणुं करे कंकणम् ।
सर्वांगे हरिचंदनं सुललितं कंठे च मुक्तावलिं
गोपस्त्री परिवेष्ठितो विजयते गोपाल चूडामणिम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kastūritilakaṃ lalāṭapaṭale vakṣaḥsthale kaustubhaṃ
nāsāgre navamauktikaṃ karatale veṇuṃ kare kaṃkaṇam .
sarvāṃge haricaṃdanaṃ sulalitaṃ kaṃṭhe ca muktāvaliṃ
gopastrī pariveṣṭhito vijayate gopāla cūḍāmaṇim ..
contentBlocks.translation: With the fragrant kasturi-mark on the forehead, the precious Kaustubha gem on the chest, the lovely pearl-jewel at the nose tip, the flute in the palm and the kankan (bangle) encircling the hand, the scented sandalwood paste all over the body, the pearl-necklace around the beautiful neck, surrounded by milk-maids - may victory be yours, O crown gem of Gopalas.
contentBlocks.meanings: कस्तूरितिलकं (kastūritilakaṃ) – kasturi-mark (kastūri:musk | tilakaṃ:mark); ललाटपटले (lalāṭapaṭale) – on the forehead (lalāṭa:forehead | paṭale:on the surface); वक्षःस्थले (vakṣaḥsthale) – on the chest (vakṣaḥ:chest | sthale:on the place); कौस्तुभं (kaustubhaṃ) – Kaustubha gem; नासाग्रे (nāsāgre) – at the nose tip (nāsā:nose | agre:at the tip); नवमौक्तिकं (navamauktikaṃ) – new pearl (nava:new | mauktikaṃ:pearl); करतले (karatale) – in the palm (kara:hand | tale:in the palm); वेणुं (veṇuṃ) – flute; करे (kare) – in the hand; कंकणम् (kaṃkaṇam) – bangle; सर्वांगे (sarvāṃge) – all over the body (sarva:all | aṅge:body); हरिचंदनं (haricaṃdanaṃ) – sandalwood paste; सुललितं (sulalitaṃ) – very lovely; कंठे (kaṇṭhe) – around the neck; च (ca) – and; मुक्तावलिं (muktāvaliṃ) – pearl-necklace (muktā:pearl | avaliṃ:necklace); गोपस्त्री (gopastrī) – milk-maids (gopa:cowherd | strī:woman); परिवेष्ठितो (pariveṣṭhito) – surrounded; विजयते (vijayate) – may victory be; गोपाल (gopāla) – Gopala; चूडामणिम् (cūḍāmaṇim) – crown jewel (cūḍā:crown | maṇim:jewel);
